segments.text: It looks like the perfect family escape. But you can't bring your kids. Because no one under eighteen is ever allowed on this island. Absolutely no exceptions.
A seaplane touches down on the water. You walk past a simple welcome mat. And the rest of the world just disappears. Your shoulders finally, truly drop.
Your bungalow has no television. Just glass doors that open straight to the sea. And a deep copper tub outside, hidden completely among the palms. You find the quiet pool.
Mornings start on your private terrace, the ocean your only view. Dinner is even better. A single table for two, right on the sand as the tide comes in.
This is Little Palm Island Resort. A place built around the simple, perfect idea of completely disappearing for a while.
